title: Happy Ghast: BombsAway Plugin
body:
![mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a668ababc7757e1f55f04822015467646e2435b6.jpeg)

**BombsAway** enhances your gameplay by adding an explosive twist with TNT mechanics. This plugin allows players to **throw TNT** and **fire charges** with a special twist. if mounted on a Happy Ghast, the player can drop TNT even while riding and shoot fire charges. However, Additionally, it introduces a Flint and Steel requirement for igniting TNT, making the game more immersive. This mechanic can be bypassed for Creative players.

[Check every version here](https://rickjeh.github.io/MCProject-Websites/bombsaway.html)

![modshowcasegif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c795adf2ca4e36e327a6460439fd5cb381e52e.gif)![modshowcasegif2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83e93561921205c57237420901bc77aaf1dfccdc.gif)


**Key Features:**
 

- Drop TNT while riding a happy ghast.
- No need to place TNT, use dispensers, boats or minecarts.
- Fully configurable via config.yml (message customization, delays, etc.).
- Permission system to control who can use the TNT throwing feature.
- Cooldown timer to prevent spamming TNT drops.
- Configurable message that appears when TNT is dropped.
- Supports enabling/disabling plugin functionality with simple commands.

**Singleplayer:** mod versions have been released, you can download it [Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/happy-ghast-bombsaway/versions)
